title: protium copal var. ternatum
intro: Protium copal var. ternatum, also known as Ternate Copal, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the resin of Ternate Copal is often used to create tonics, salves, and infusions, which are used to support the immune system and alleviate various health conditions.
